description: Type Metadata example of Section 4.1: the vct and vct#integrity claims of the SD-JWT VC payload excerpt (Figure 15; the figure elides the remaining claims with '...'), and the Type Metadata document retrieved from the vct URL (Figure 16). The vct#integrity hash binds the payload to that document.

type_metadata_document.description: This is our education credential. Don't panic.
